== Notes for [[Item:Q105853|Q105853]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death): 10th Muharram 61 AH (12th October 680 AD)

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aun_ibn_Abdillah_and_Muhammad_ibn_Abdillah

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abdullah_ibn_Ja%27far

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:4595923312630072927

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
